outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected due to heavily negative 0DTE GEX and bearish skew.
outlook.summary: Dealers hold massive short gamma exposure in the 0DTE expiration, which will amplify price movements. Strong bearish skews and high Put/Call ratios across all expirations indicate heavy hedging activity. Price is trapped between the 0DTE Max Pain at 713 and the Weekly Gamma Flip at 715, with structural support resting at the 700 Resonance level.

Heavy Call OI in both Weekly (15.4k) and Monthly (33k) expirations. Immediate resistance just above the current spot price.
0DTE Max Pain level. High volume Call OI (274k) aligns here, creating an immediate gravitational pull for the daily session.
Monthly Max Pain and massive Put OI (46k). Represents the ultimate target for a bearish continuation if the 700 support fails.
Weekly Max Pain level, situated below current spot. Acts as an intermediate gravitational target for the weekly expiration.
